positive: Highly detailed, central illustration of celestial fauna: a mythical bioluminescent moth resting on an oversized lunar fern. The style is a blend of intricate Art Nouveau and modern vector illustration, featuring sharp, elegant silhouettes and deep contrast. The composition must be balanced and symmetrical, framed for apparel printing. Use a palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, muted gold, and glowing turquoise. Lighting should be dramatic and source-free, emphasizing the glowing outlines of the moth's wings and the fern's edges. Clean linework, sticker-art aesthetic, high contrast, white background isolation, perfect symmetry, full coverage print design.
negative: blur, noise, low detail, watermark, text, writing, logo, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, cropped, out of frame, bokeh, jpeg artifacts
